headline: Does Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Offer an Attractive Risk-Reward Opportunity?
summary: Black Bear Value Partners, an investment advisory firm, issued its second-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Black Bear Value Fund lost -3.6% in March, bringing the year-to-date return to +1.5%. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 dropped- 1.0% in June and has a YTD return of +10.2%. The HFRI […]
